# 🌊 FATHOM — The Perfect Number Terminal

[![License: MIT](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-yellow.svg)](https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT)

**Terminal Emulator + Shell + TUI Hub — All-in-One.**

```
1 fathom = 6 feet       ← n = 6
"FATHOM" = 6 letters    ← n = 6
σ(n)·φ(n) = n·τ(n)     ⟺ n = 6
```

A terminal where every design constant derives from the arithmetic of the smallest perfect number.

<!-- SHARED:PROJECTS:START -->
**[YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xtKhWSfC1Qo)**

#!/usr/bin/env bash
# FATHOM Infinite Growth — 10 domain + 6 common phases
# Usage: bash scripts/infinite_growth.sh [--interval MIN] [--max-cycles N]
# bash 3.2 compatible

set -euo pipefail

SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "$0")" && pwd)"

# ── Shared infrastructure ──
source "$SCRIPT_DIR/lib/growth_common.sh"

FATHOM_ROOT="$PROJECT_ROOT"
STATE_FILE="$GROWTH_DIR/growth_state.json"
GROWTH_BUS="$HOME/Dev/nexus/shared/growth_bus.jsonl"
_LOG_FILE="$GROWTH_DIR/growth.log"
PIDFILE="/tmp/fathom_growth.pi
